substep.title: Gather Metadata
substep.action: Run `thoughts metadata` to resolve owner, ISO timestamp, repository, branch, commit, and shared_folder. These populate the frontmatter per references/research/document-format — never use placeholder values.

substep.title: Write the Document
substep.action: Compose the frontmatter from the metadata per document-format. Prepend it to the body from step 4. Write to {shared_folder}/research/ (or output_location when provided) with filename YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MM-SS_{topic-slug}.md.

substep.title: Convert Citations to Permalinks
substep.action: Check whether the commit is pushed (branch has an upstream, or is the default branch). If pushed: resolve owner/repo via `gh repo view --json owner,name` and convert local file:line citations to GitHub permalinks per document-format. If not pushed: keep local file:line paths — a dangling permalink is worse than an honest local path.

substep.title: Sync
substep.action: Run `thoughts sync` so the document is indexed and discoverable by thoughts-locator on future investigations.
